'''sabïfnïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arachnidology|arachnidology]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-b-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arachnidology|arachnidology]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| sabïfnïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || sæbïfnïfth || sæbïfnïfj || sæbïfnïfsh || sæbïfnïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || sabïfbïfnïfth || sabïfbïfnïfj || sabïfbïfnïfsh || sabïfbïfnïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || sabïfnïfth || sabïfnïfj || sabïfnïfsh || sabïfnïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || sabïffnïffth || sabïffnïffj || sabïffnïffsh || sabïffnïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || sabïfnïfïf || sabïfnïfïf || sabïfnïfïf || sabïfnïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || sabïfnïfth || sabïfnïfj || sabïfnïfsh || sabïfnïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || sabïfnïfïfl || sabïfnïfïfl || sabïfnïfïfl || sabïfnïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || sabïfnïfïfïf || sabïfnïfïfïf || sabïfnïfïfïf || sabïfnïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || sabïfnïfïfn || sabïfnïfïfn || sabïfnïfïfn || sabïfnïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || sabïfnïfïforo || sabïfnïfïforo || sabïfnïfïforo || sabïfnïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
